zh.Stockleigh, Devonshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭戴文斯圖德利
zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English於1150年出生在英國英格蘭戴文。他與Elizabeth Melson結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭戴文斯圖德利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: English
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

variants.name: Engles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Remi.
English and Scottish: variant of   English   or   Inglis  .
Altered form of German and Dutch   Engels  .

variants.name: Inglis
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): ethnic name from Scots Inglis ‘English(man)’. Compare English .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English was born in 1150, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Elizabeth Melson. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Stoodleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English est né en 1150, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Elizabeth Melson. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Stoodleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English wurde 1150 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat Elizabeth Melson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Stoodleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English è nato il nel 1150 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Elizabeth Melson. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Stoodleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Stokenham, Devon, England: イギリスデボンストケンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Englishは1150年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた。Elizabeth Melsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスデボンストオッドレイグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth Melson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토들리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English nasceu em 1150, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Melson. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em Stoodleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English родился в 1150 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Melson. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности студлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Gilbert De English nació en 1150, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Elizabeth Melson. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Stoodleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
